signals.headline: Congress-IUML Seat-Sharing Deal Confirmed for Kerala Assembly Elections on April 9** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence
signals.raw:
Congress-IUML Seat-Sharing Deal Confirmed for Kerala Assembly Elections on April 9** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence

Congress and the **Indian Union Muslim League (IUML)** finalized their alliance under Kerala's UDF, with Congress contesting **95 seats** and IUML **27 seats** in the 140-seat assembly polls voting on **April 9**, as announced in recent reports[1]. This resolves a key pre-election p
